title: Wordless Wednesday: Bridge Cat
excerpt: This little guy. So silly. He absolutely HAD to be as near me as possible in case I wanted to share my sandwich with him, so he laid ACROSS our two chairs forming a bridge. He stayed like that for a long while, even though I can’t imagine it was too comfortable.
content:
This little guy. So silly. He absolutely HAD to be as near me as possible in case I wanted to share my sandwich with him, so he laid ACROSS our two chairs forming a bridge. He stayed like that for a long while, even though I can’t imagine it was too comfortable.

What weird yet totally adorable things do your pets do?

featuredImage.alt: Wordless Wednesday: Bridge Cat on Katie Crafts; http://www.katiecrafts.com
